---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="cv-header">
  <p>You can view my full CV below, or <a href="files/David_Kang_CV.pdf" download><i class="fas fa-download"></i> download the PDF</a>.</p>
</div>

<div class="cv-embed">
  <iframe src="files/David_Kang_CV.pdf" width="100%" height="900px" style="border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 6px;">
    This browser does not support embedded PDFs. Please <a href="files/David_Kang_CV.pdf">download the PDF</a> to view it.
  </iframe>
</div>
```
